steps.name: preserve-current-assets
steps.summary: Current 2D active PNGs were snapshotted to assets/rupa_theme/character/back-v3-2d before replacement work.

steps.name: generate-rig-friendly-assets
steps.summary: Generated back-v4-rig-friendly assets, promoted non-head body/limb/hand/foot/tail/chalk-bag assets to active back/, and aligned rig native sizes.

steps.name: verify-and-document
steps.summary: Updated the rig design spec with rollback points and ran npm test, npx tsc --noEmit, git diff --check, and PNG metadata checks.
